business_ideas.idea: GA4 migration service: help businesses migrate from Google Analytics to GA4 for a fee
Trade show business targeting niche B2B industry (using Twitter influencers as partners)
Podcasting industry trade show (booth vendors, networking for podcasters)

predictions.text: Someone can make $1M in next 6 months as GA4 migration expert for small businesses
Trade shows will consistently sell for 10-15x profit, unlike e-commerce at 1x

dynamics: Sam brings half-baked ideas and observations, Shaan polishes and extends them into frameworks. Both riff collaboratively but Sam is more rapid-fire while Shaan synthesizes and adds structure. High energy, genuinely good partnership dynamic. Sam mentioned this directly: 'this is called chemistry.'
frameworks: Rhetorical spell (Plato): charisma/oratory can override logical truth in oral debates
Delphi method: anonymous, time-delayed group decision-making to combat groupthink
Working backwards from valuation multiples to reverse-engineer which businesses to start
learnings: Oral debates reward persuasiveness and quick thinking rather than truth-seeking; written, cited arguments with response time would surface better ideas
Organizational hierarchies reward loud voices in meetings; anonymous, time-delayed feedback (Delphi method) reveals better thinking
Regulatory constraints (privacy laws, cookie restrictions) create business opportunities for companies solving attribution problems
Trade show businesses are underrated: consistent 10-15x profit multiples, decade+ lifespans, and strong buyer interest from PE firms
Working backwards from high valuation multiples can guide business selection even without passion-driven motivation

banger_quotes.quote: I love a good freak show
My nickname is the nuts and if you know poker you know what that means
This is called chemistry my friend, this is how it's done
These things can sell for way more money and last dozens of decades

Ukie Media expected acquisition: $100-120M (12x profit multiple)
